title: koeleria intricata
intro: Koeleria intricata, also known as intricata hair grass or mountain hair grass, is a species of grass native to high-altitude regions in the Himalayas and other mountain ranges in Asia. Traditionally, Koeleria intricata has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Koeleria intricata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or powder, which can be used to make capsules or other medicinal formulations.
